title: ToolsSetActive
description: Method `tools/set_active` (ext → host, request). Sets the active tool subset for the session. The host CLAMPS the requested set to the agent's `enabled_tools` and never widens it — the returned `active` set may therefore be a strict subset of the requested `tools`.

tools.description: Requested set of active tool names.

active.description: The tool names actually made active, after clamping to `enabled_tools`.
